author: chotuchaiwala
content: are the new ere-guests(`v0.11.0`) incompatible with current zkboost(`v0.7.0`)?

author: han0110
content: Yes there is some SSZ spec changes in `ere-guests@v0.11.0` so `new_payload_request_root` will be mismatch for Ethrex. the next release of `ere-guests` should  fix that ([this PR](https://github.com/eth-act/ere-guests/pull/50) specifically)
